subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My leaf! All praise be unto God that thou hast attained unto the lights of the Day of God and hast hearkened unto the call of Him Who is the Desire of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی الحمد لله بانوار یوم الله فائز شدی ندای مقصود عالمیان را
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
